attributes.description: Per-service total scores from the latest workflow run.
attributes.title: Vern: Service Scores

attributes.description: Per-rule pass/fail evidence per service. rule_id links to the upstream spec.
attributes.title: Vern: Per-Rule Breakdown

query.esql: FROM instrumentation-score-results | WHERE rule_id == "_TOTAL" | EVAL score = score::double | KEEP service.name, score, category | SORT score DESC | LIMIT 100
FROM instrumentation-score-results | WHERE NOT (rule_id IN ("_BOOTSTRAP", "_TOTAL")) | EVAL status = CASE(rule_passed == true, "Pass", "Fail") | STATS n = COUNT(*) BY status
FROM instrumentation-score-results | WHERE rule_id == "_TOTAL" | EVAL s = score::double | STATS avg_score = ROUND(AVG(s), 1)
FROM instrumentation-score-results | WHERE rule_id == "_TOTAL" | STATS services = COUNT(*)
FROM instrumentation-score-results | WHERE rule_id == "_TOTAL" | EVAL score = score::double | KEEP score | LIMIT 1
FROM instrumentation-score-results | WHERE NOT (rule_id IN ("_BOOTSTRAP", "_TOTAL")) | EVAL status = CASE(rule_passed == true, "Pass", "Fail") | STATS n = COUNT(*) BY status

attributes.description: Per-service score leaderboard. Click a service.name in the score table → Open Service Drill-down.
